title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 08 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 08 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 08 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/05/2023
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 5.02%，the main contract I2309 closed 721.5. some traderswere active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand in the morning, but purchases are down in the afternoon. Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable.
